footer.tagline: Your operating system for growth in the AI era. Hands-on programs that turn ambition into capability.
footer.meta: Made for people who refuse to plateau.

head.title: Career GPS Assessment — Zero2Grow
head.description: Career GPS is a calm self-assessment dashboard that helps you understand your direction, strengths, growth areas, and next focus.

hero.title: Know where you are today, so you can choose where to go next.
hero.lede: A calm self-assessment that turns six growth areas into a practical dashboard with clear insight, a score, and a next step.

saveSnapshot.label: Save Snapshot
saveSnapshot.fallbackAlert: Complete and submit the assessment first to view your dashboard snapshot.

hero.note: Takes a few minutes. No right or wrong answers.

introFlow.title: Take a quick pause before you begin.
introFlow.lede: You will move through six focused stages, one question at a time. Add your details if you want your final snapshot to feel more personal.
expectations: Real-time score and summary at the end

assessmentSection.title: Answer honestly. The dashboard does the rest.
assessmentSection.lede: Move through the steps at your pace and submit when every question is complete.

uiText.initialStepDescription: Clarity of goals and where you are headed next.

nudges.complete: Stage complete. Keep the streak going.
nudges.oneRemaining: Final push. 1 more to unlock next stage.
nudges.manyRemainingTemplate: Great start. {{remaining}} to reach the next stage.

submitConfirmation.title: Submit assessment and open your dashboard?
submitConfirmation.body: Your answers will be saved in this browser session, then your Career GPS Dashboard will open.

questionFlow.storageErrorAlert: We could not save your snapshot locally. Please allow browser storage and try again.

sections.title: Direction
sections.description: Clarity of goals and the path you are choosing next.
questions: I have a clear idea of what I want to work toward in the next 12 months.
I know which skills or capabilities I need to develop.
I can describe what success looks like for me right now.

sections.title: Confidence
sections.description: Self-belief, momentum, and the ability to act without perfect certainty.
questions: I feel confident talking about my strengths.
I take action even when I do not have everything figured out.
I can handle uncertainty without getting completely stuck.

sections.title: Personal Brand & Visibility
sections.description: How clearly you communicate your value to other people.
questions: I can clearly explain what I am good at.
My online or professional profile reflects my strengths.
People around me understand the value I bring.

sections.title: Professional Communication
sections.description: Clarity and confidence in writing, speaking, and presenting ideas.
questions: I can explain my ideas clearly.
I can write professional messages with confidence.
I can structure my thoughts when presenting or speaking.

sections.title: AI Readiness
sections.description: Confidence using AI practically for learning, planning, writing, and work.
questions: I already use AI tools for learning, writing, planning, or work.
I know how to write useful prompts.
I know how to review and improve AI-generated outputs.

sections.title: Productivity & Consistency
sections.description: Habits, systems, and execution that help you follow through.
questions: I have a system for planning my work or studies.
I follow through consistently on important tasks.
I manage my time and energy intentionally.

stageBands.label: Early Exploration
stageBands.message: You are still shaping direction. Your next gain will come from narrowing choices and naming what matters most.

stageBands.label: Building Foundation
stageBands.message: You have some momentum. The most useful next move is to make your habits and communication more deliberate.

stageBands.label: Growth Ready
stageBands.message: You already have a strong base to build on. Focus on visibility, consistency, and practical AI use to unlock the next level.

stageBands.label: Momentum Builder
stageBands.message: You are operating with strong readiness. Keep refining the system and turning your strengths into visible opportunities.

recommendationsByCategory.visibility: Focus on making your value more visible. Start by writing a one-sentence personal brand statement and updating your profile summary.
recommendationsByCategory.aiReadiness: Start using AI for one practical task every week, such as planning, writing, summarizing, or learning.
recommendationsByCategory.productivity: Build a simple weekly planning routine and turn repeated tasks into reusable workflows.
recommendationsByCategory.direction: Write down one clear 12-month direction and name the three capabilities that would move you toward it fastest.
recommendationsByCategory.confidence: Pick one strength story and practice saying it out loud, then take one small action before you feel fully ready.
recommendationsByCategory.communication: Use one repeatable communication structure for emails, updates, and speaking: context, point, ask.

surveyModel.defaultRecommendation: Pick one area to improve this month, then turn it into a small weekly habit.

head.title: Career GPS Dashboard — Zero2Grow
head.description: Your Career GPS dashboard with category scores, strengths, focus areas, and next-step recommendation.

resultsSection.title: Your Career GPS result is ready.
resultsSection.lede: This is your starting point: a score, a stage, your strongest areas, and the few things most worth improving next.

sections.reflectionPrompt: Based on your Career GPS result, what is one area you want to improve in the next 30 days?

emptyState.title: Complete your assessment first.
emptyState.lede: We could not find a submitted snapshot in this browser session yet.
